title: aolu Rapiers
description: A Data Pack which adds a new custom weapon that is a Hybrid of a Sword and Spear
body:
![Rapiers Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73693ea5f67ed51ef468a684e300470fa4b9f017.png)
# REQUIREMENTS
- [aolu Common Resources](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aolu-common-resources)
- If using Data Pack version: Copy and Paste the Data Pack into your Resource Packs folder and activate it\
**OR**\
Download [aolu Resourcepack Collection](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aolu-resourcepack-collection)
# Description
This Data Pack adds a new craftable weapon to the game: Rapiers!\
These act as a **hybrid between a sword and a spear**, allowing for **quick close-range strikes**, or **slower long-range pokes**\
\
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I35czXsN/images/93ee0cd00cdfce5d904daeb7b2d201bde1389afd.png)
# SHOWCASE
<iframe width="1920" height="1080" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TKf4Bg8jR-g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## MECHANICS
The Rapier has a **faster attack speed**, but **lower attack damage** than a Sword
### FINESSE STACKS
Dealing damage to enemies will grant you **Finesse Stacks**, increasing your **attack range**, **attack damage** and **movement speed**\
Finesse Stacks max out at 5
### SWING MODE
Default mode of attack\
This is a standard sword swing which can hit multiple enemies with sweeping attacks
### THRUST MODE
Activated by holding sprint or crouch\
Attack Speed is lowered\
Attack Damage and Attack Range is increased\
Attacks will use Spear Melee Mechanics instead
### POWER THRUST MODE
Activated by holding sprint or crouch within 15 ticks after landing a **Swing** attack\
Thrust Attack Speed Penalty is removed\
Power Thrusts deal extra damage than a normal Thrust and deal **extra knockback**, great for setting up a **Dash Attack**!\
Power Thrust lasts until the 15 tick timer runs out **OR** until you land a hit, whichever is first
### DASH MODE
Right-Clicking with any amount of **Finesse Stacks** will hold out the rapier in front of you like a spear and launch you forward\
Launch Velocity Increases with each Finesse Stack that you have\
Dash attacks at 5 Finesse Stacks Bypass **ALL** Armor/Defenses and Resistance Effects!\
\
The damage of a Dash Attack Depends on your **Attack Damage** and **Movement Speed**!
- Strength and Speed Potions help with getting extra damage
- Sprinting before Dashing will also increase Dash Damage
### GUARDING
Rapiers can also block Melee Attacks when you don't have **Finesse Stacks**, reducing incoming damage by 40% **(Projectiles, Explosions, etc are unaffected)**

\
With correct combos and attack chains, you can swiftly slay any foe in your path!
